creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
ports/plain/LEGAL no longer exists. Two pages bugged: 

% rg plain/LEGAL /usr/doc
/usr/doc/website/content/en/copyright/_index.adoc
18:== https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/plain/LEGAL[FreeBSD Ports redistribution restrictions]

/usr/doc/website/content/ja/copyright/_index.adoc
18:== https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/plain/LEGAL[FreeBSD Ports を再配布する際の制限]
% 


It's in the Wayback Machine <https://web.archive.org/web/20210513214800/https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/plain/LEGAL>, but I don't know whether there's something more recent elsewhere. 

Should the bugged paragraph be removed, or changed?
